name: Djinn Java
description: JDK (via SDKMAN) + jdtls (Eclipse JDT language server) + scip-java. Pick gradle or maven as the build tool.

jdk_version.description: SDKMAN identifier for the JDK. 25-tem (Temurin 25) is the current LTS as of September 2025. Accepts anything SDKMAN knows: `25-tem`, `21-tem`, `17.0.11-zulu`, etc.

build_tool.description: Build tool. One of: gradle | maven.
